Where the time goes

Hours that leave every week.
Work AI can handle.

✍️
5–8 hrs/wk
Writing
Proposals, emails, reports, content — first drafts that Claude can produce in seconds.
🔎
3–5 hrs/wk
Research
Market analysis, competitive research, synthesizing sources — Claude does this in minutes.
📋
2–4 hrs/wk
Documentation
SOPs, process guides, meeting notes — always pushed to the bottom, always piling up.
📬
3–6 hrs/wk
Communications
Customer responses, follow-ups, internal updates — routine writing with high volume and low leverage.
How we get it back

Six ways Claude reclaims
your team's time.

01
Identify the Time Sinks
We audit your workflows and pinpoint exactly which tasks are consuming the most time relative to their value — and which Claude can take over.
02
Build Drafting Workflows
First-draft generation for any writing-heavy task. Your team reviews and refines instead of starting from a blank page.
03
Automate Research
Claude synthesizes sources, summarizes documents, and delivers research outputs your team can act on immediately.
04
Standardize Communications
Templates and workflows for your most frequent communication types — consistent quality, dramatically less time per message.
05
Train the Whole Team
Time savings only compound when everyone on your team is using Claude. We train everyone until adoption is real.
06
Measure It
Before-and-after time tracking on your specific workflows. You'll have real numbers — hours saved per person per week.
Common questions

What people ask before
getting started.

How many hours can we realistically save?
Most teams see 8–15 hours per person per week on the workflows we target — writing, research, and communications. The range depends on your role and how much of your current work fits those categories.
How quickly will we see results?
Most clients see meaningful time savings within the first week of using the workflows we build. The compounding happens as the team adopts more workflows over 30–60 days.
Will the quality be as good?
With properly configured system prompts and workflows, Claude produces outputs that require less editing than what most teams produce manually. The quality bar goes up, not down.
What if my team doesn't adopt it?
We don't stop at setup. We train your team with hands-on sessions until everyone is using the workflows confidently. Adoption is part of what we're hired to deliver.
How do you measure the time savings?
We baseline time-per-task on your specific workflows before implementation and measure again 30 days after. You get a clear before-and-after report with real numbers.
